name: Ryuuichi Kashima
description: Older brother, babysitter, and has a very close relationship with his toddler brother Kotarou. Both his parents died in a plane crash, now Kotarou and Ryuuichi live alone.

name: Sakuya Tachibana
description: The sub-leader of first unit. She is a top-rank shooter, and her god arc is a sniper (old-type; long range). (Source: Wikipedia)

name: Wanyin Jiang
description: Jiang Wanyin is the current leader of the Yunmeng Jiang Sect and the uncle of Jin Ling. He is more commonly known to other cultivators by his courtesy name, Jiang Wanyin, or his title, Sandu Shengshou.
mediaTitles: The Founder of Diabolism: Final Season
searchTerms: The Founder of Diabolism: Final Season

name: Ariel
description: The current Demon Lord. ~!She is the Origin Taratect, Ancient Divine Beast, and Ruler of Gluttony. She is the origin of all Taratects in the System, and thus all spiders can be considered her kin. The Queen Taratects and Puppet Taratects are her closest kin, having wills and personalities of their own, and are not dominated by Kin Control, even though she has this skill.!~ (Source: Kumo Desu ga, Nani ka? Wiki)
mediaTitles: So I'm a Spider, So What?
So I'm a Spider, So What?
So I'm a Spider, So What?
searchTerms: So I'm a Spider, So What?

name: Seri Kikyou
description: Seri Kikyou is a vampire and a gyaru that seeks enjoyment in life and finds it increasingly challenging to have fun.

name: Tome Kurata
description: __School:__ Salt Middle School __School club: __Telepathy Club (President) Tome seems to be a slacker but is passionate about the possibility of using telepathy to contact extraterrestrials. However, when the Telepathy Club's research into the matter bears no results, she quickly gives up. When she learns that Mob is an Esper, her passion is revitalized.

name: Tong Qiu
description: Qiu Tong is a main protagonist of Tamen de Gushi. She is a second year in class 3 of South High. Qiu Tong is pretty popular at her school, but despite that has only a few friends. She is the love interest of Sun Jing.

name: Yui Yamada
description: A quiet girl who is in charge of greenification. She's poor at sports and singing.
mediaTitles: Your Light: Kase-san and Morning Glories
searchTerms: Your Light: Kase-san and Morning Glories

name: Emma
description: Emma is a blind woman who always has her eyes closed and originally uses a cane. She ran away from home and went looking for a job. She meets Aleksander by accident by hitting him with her cane and he eventually becomes her lover. She loves croissants, the smell of perfume, and fluffy clothes. She also likes wines and spirits, and herbal tea. She has three older sisters, two younger sisters, and a dog.

name: Epsilon
description: Photon-powered advanced robot who dislikes fighting and cares for homeless children. Created for war along with the other advanced ones, but refused to go there because of his pacifistic beliefs. Arguably the strongest out of the war series, Epsilon uses the Sun itself as his power source, capable of launching various heat and light based attacks, as well as creating photon-shields and manipulating photons. Epsilon is also capable of willingly detaching his own hands and controlling them remotel

name: Rose Oriana
description: __Race:__ Human Rosa Oriana is a noble Princess from the Oriana kingdom. She is known for being a genius in art in her kingdom. However, she came to Midgar Royal Spellsword Academy in order to learn swordsmanship. ~!Later [Alpha](https://anilist.co/character/162246/Alpha) discovered Rose, who became a fugitive for assassinating her father and was then offered membership into Shadow Garden.!~ (Source: To Be a Power in the Shadows! Wiki)

name: Viktor Licht
description: __Height:__ 187cm (6'1") __Affiliation:__ Special Fire Force Company 8 __Rank:__ Science Team (First Class Fire Soldier Head of Research(Haijima) Viktor Licht is company 8's Science Officer. Viktor attended the Imperial University of Tokyo, where he wrote a thesis about Spontaneous Human Combustion. After graduating at the top of his class in record time, he joined Haijima Industries. Having locked himself away while doing research, he was eventually appointed head of incendiary research and pub

name: Gin Gagamaru
description: __Height:__ 191 cm Gagamaru was a forward who aspired to be the best in the world, along with the others of Blue Lock. When first arriving at Blue Lock, he was a member of Team Z during the First Selection.

name: Hitomi Hino
description: __Species:__ Human The only other human in the academy, and incidentally, the only female human.
mediaTitles: Murenase! Seton Gakuen EX: Juu Joshi-tachi no Yuzame Chuuihou
searchTerms: Murenase! Seton Gakuen EX: Juu Joshi-tachi no Yuzame Chuuihou

name: Kenichirou Ryuuzaki
description: An old friend of Akira Tendou from college and the rugby team. He hasn't seen him in a year before the apocalypse. After he graduated from college he became a salesmen at a major real estate company because of his great communication skills. In reality he seems almost perfect but he too was miserable at his job and wanted to become a comedian.
mediaTitles: Zom 100: Bucket List of the Dead
Zom 100: Bucket List of the Dead

name: Pandora's Actor
description: __Height:__ 177cm __Race:__ Doppelgänger __Affiliation:__ Great Tomb of Nazarick __Occupation:__ Area Guardian of the Treasury __Creator:__ Ainz Ooal Gown (Momonga) __Hobby:__ Managing Magic Items The Area Guardian in charge of the Treasury and finances of Nazarick, who was created by Ains himself. He's a Doppelgänger whose face is a simple egghead with three holes dressed in a Neo-Nazi-esque uniform. In Momonga's original design, he's the combination of everything that he thought was cool, with

name: Tinasha
description: Lives at the top of a tower in the wilderness and is said to grant the wishes of those who climb to the top.

name: Hana Ichijou
description: __Height:__ 157 cm Hana Ichijou is the younger step-sister of [Tatsuya Fukuda](https://anilist.co/character/133817), the coach of Tokyo City Esperion FC Youth. She has been a football fan since she was very young. She was especially a fan of Fukuda, even before their parents married. Hana has a deep knowledge of nutrition as she aspires to become a sports surgeon. She uses that knowledge to make meal plans for the players, notably [Ashito](https://anilist.co/character/133818/Ashito--Aoi) and [Ku

name: Hiroki Dan
description: Hiroki Dan is the main antagonist of "Trace: Kasouken Houi Kenkyuuin no Tsuisou" and the main protagonist of his spin-off "Brutal: Satsujin Keisatsukan no Kokuhaku". He is a highly ranked police investigator and a serial killer. Dan is part of the Investigation Division Unit 1 and the son of a former police superintendent General. He seeks out criminals who could not be convicted by the law, and kills them. According to his own testimony during a confession in a church, he admits to doing this m

name: Michizou Tachihara
description: __Height:__ 176 cm __Ability:__ Midwinter Memento A commander of the Black Lizards, the Port Mafia's squad of hitmen. Though he puts up a tough and violent front, he cares deeply for his friends. Very skilled gunner, especially when dual wielding.

name: Mirellia Q Melromarc
description: The queen of Melromarc. She holds the true power of the crown and is generally a just ruler. She is known for her diplomacy and negotiation skills.
mediaTitles: The Rising of the Shield Hero
The Rising of the Shield Hero Season 2
The Rising of the Shield Hero Season 3

name: Souta Kazama
description: Kazama Souta is one of the secondary characters in My Senpai is Annoying. He is a senpai at Igarashi Futaba's company. Kazama is a young adult with short black hair, who can be seen in a white button-up shirt with black working pants and occasionally, a blue necktie. Kazama is boring and gives a boring look, and seemingly doesn't have many friends. He prefers to spend the New Year alone playing video games. He also has a hobby of making origami. His ears are sensitive.

name: Claudine Saijou
description: She is a character in the Shōjo☆Kageki Revue Starlight franchise. She is a second-year student from the Actor Training Department at Seisho Music Academy's 99th Graduating Class, as well as the second seat in the class. Born to a Japanese father and a French mother, this talented Stage Girl already has a long career as a child actress. Upon entering the school, she meets the brilliant Maya Tendo and immediately begins a staunch rivalry.
mediaTitles: Shoujo☆Kageki Revue Starlight: Rondo Rondo Rondo
searchTerms: Shoujo☆Kageki Revue Starlight: Rondo Rondo Rondo

name: Hajime Ichinose
description: **Height:** 155 cm The main character of the story, Hajime is an 11th grader attending a high school in Tachikawa City. A powerful and energetic girl with an artistic spirit, she is a little bit strange in a good way. She has a passion for stationery goods, and gets extremely excited when it comes to different models of pens and scissors.
